name: Tanazir Silverquil
resist: slashing from nonmagical attacks (while in dim light or darkness)

spellcasting.name: Sorcerer Spellcasting
headerEntries: Tanazir's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 22}, {@hit 14} to hit with spell attacks). He requires no material components to cast his spells. Tanazir can cast the following spells:

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: Tanazir can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If Tanazir fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Living Shadow
entries: While in dim light or darkness, Tanazir has resistance to damage that isn't force, psychic, or radiant.

trait.name: Chronal Shroud
entries: Tanazir's mastery over time warps incoming light and bends kinetic energy around his shifting form. Attack rolls made against Tanazir from a distance of more than 30 feet away have disadvantage.

trait.name: Chronal Clarity
entries: Tanazir has two turns each round. He takes his first turn at his full initiative count, and his second turn at his initiative count minus 10. He cannot use his reaction or a bonus action more than once per round, but his legendary actions refresh at the start of each of his turns.

trait.name: Aura of the Epoch
entries: Time crawls sluggishly in a 30-foot aura around Tanazir. Any enemy creature that starts its turn within the aura has its reaction suppressed and cannot use it until the start of its next turn. Additionally, if an enemy tries to cast a spell with a casting time of 1 reaction while within the aura, they must succeed on a {@dc 22} Wisdom saving throw or the spell fails and the slot is wasted.

trait.name: Cycle of Rebirth (Mythic Phase Trigger)
entries: When Tanazir is reduced to 0 hit points, his physical form doesn't die. Instead, his timeline instantly resets back to an optimized state: he sheds any ongoing conditions or hexes, teleports up to 60 feet away to an unoccupied space, and magically heals to 300 hit points. For the next 1 hour, his physical attacks deal an additional 11 ({@damage 2d10}) force damage on a hit. Once this trait activates, it cannot activate again for 7 days.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Tanazir uses his Frightful Presence. He then makes three attacks: one with his Chrono-Poison Bite and two with his Claws.

action.name: Chronal Stasis
entries: Tanazir briefly steps completely outside the flow of time. This action functions exactly like the *time stop* spell, giving Tanazir 2 ({@dice 1d3 + 1}) immediate, consecutive turns during which other creatures cannot move or act. If Tanazir leaves this state or affects another creature or an object worn or carried by them, the stasis ends immediately. Once Tanazir uses this action, he cannot use it again until the start of his next initiative turn.

action.name: Chrono-Poison Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 17} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}20 ({@damage 2d10 + 9}) piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) poison damage and 10 ({@damage 3d6}) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, its speed is halved until the start of Tanazir's next turn due to time-dilation.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 17} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d6 + 9}) slashing damage.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 17} to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. {@h}18 ({@damage 2d8 + 9}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Frightful Presence
entries: Each creature of Tanazir's choice within 120 feet must succeed on a {@dc 22} Wisdom saving throw or become {@condition frightened} for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

action.name: Breath Weapons {@recharge 5}
entries: Tanazir uses one of the following breath weapons:

Shadow-Poison Breath:** Tanazir exhales a 90-foot cone of decaying, toxic shadow. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 25} Constitution saving throw, taking 84 ({@damage 24d6}) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success. A humanoid reduced to 0 hit points by this damage dies, and an undead shadow rises from its corpse under Tanazir's permanent control.

Time-Rift Breath:** Tanazir exhales a shimmering wave of chronal distortion in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 25} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 55 ({@damage 10d10}) force damage and is cast forward in time: it disappears, magically stepping out of the timeline until the end of Tanazir's next turn, effectively losing its placement in the initiative order and dropping {@status concentration} on any spells. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage and isn't displaced.

reaction.name: Temporal Slip
entries: When Tanazir is hit by an attack, he can cast his reaction out of time, briefly flickering out of existence. He rolls a {@dice d6}. On a 4 or higher, the attack misses him entirely, and he teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space he can see.

legendary.name: Detect / Shadow Stealth
entries: Tanazir makes a Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) check or takes the Hide action if he is in dim light or darkness.

legendary.name: Tail Attack
entries: Tanazir makes a tail attack.

legendary.name: Wing Attack (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Tanazir beats his wings. Each creature within 15 feet of him must succeed on a {@dc 25} Dexterity saving throw or take 16 ({@damage 2d6 + 9}) bludgeoning damage and be knocked {@condition prone}. Tanazir can then fly up to half his flying speed.

legendary.name: Mire of the Green (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Tanazir calls upon his green dragon domain to force grasping shadows and thorned vines to erupt from the ground in a 20-foot radius centered on a point he can see within 120 feet. The area becomes difficult terrain, and each creature within must succeed on a {@dc 20} Strength saving throw or be {@condition restrained}.

legendary.name: Chronal Rewind (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: Tanazir targets one creature he can see within 90 feet. The target must succeed on a {@dc 22} Wisdom saving throw or have its individual timeline rewound to the start of the round: it is teleported back to the physical space it occupied at the start of the round, any spell it cast since then is undone (expending the slot regardless), and any hit points it recovered are lost.
Lair Actions
On initiative count 20 (losing initiative ties), Tanazir takes a lair action to cause one of the following effects; Tanazir can't use the same effect two rounds in a row:

legendary.name: Chronal Echoes
entries: Tanazir manipulates the timestream of the lair, forcing the echoes of past and future moments to collide. Up to three creatures Tanazir can see within 120 feet must succeed on a {@dc 22} Wisdom saving throw or be affected by a temporal duplicate. Until initiative count 20 on the next round, whenever an affected target takes an action, moves, or casts a spell, it must immediately roll a {@dice d6}. On a 1-3, the action or movement is delayed and fails to resolve until the very end of the current turn (wasting the tactical timing of spells or movement).

legendary.name: Umbral Fog
entries: A cloud of thick, caustic, shadow-infused green gas fills a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point Tanazir can see within 120 feet. The fog spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. Each creature that starts its turn in the fog or enters it for the first time on a turn must make a {@dc 22} Constitution saving throw, taking 28 ({@damage 8d6}) poison damage and 14 ({@damage 4d6}) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success. The fog lasts until initiative count 20 on the next round.

legendary.name: Grasping Timelines
entries: Tendrils of dark, vine-like shadows erupt from the floor, walls, and ceiling in a 40-foot radius centered on a point Tanazir chooses within 90 feet. Each creature in that area must succeed on a {@dc 22} Strength saving throw or be {@condition restrained} by the paradoxical timeline fragments. A creature can use its action to make a {@dc 22} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) or Dexterity ({@skill Acrobatics}) check, freeing itself or another creature within its reach on a success. The vines disappear on initiative count 20 of the next round.
Regional Effects
The region containing Tanazir Silverquil's lair is warped by his multifaceted draconic magic, creating one or more of the following effects:

legendary.name: Thickened Wilderness & Umbral Overgrowth
entries: Within 6 miles of the lair, forests and vegetation mutate rapidly, growing thick with thorned vines and leaves that actively absorb light. The area is permanently treated as dim light, even during a clear midday. Furthermore, any check made to track a creature or navigate through this region has disadvantage due to the shifting undergrowth.

legendary.name: Chronal Fractures
entries: Within 6 miles of the lair, local time becomes unstable. Time passes differently for travelers: a group might spend what feels like 1 hour traversing a forest path, only to discover that 24 hours have passed in the outside world (or vice versa). Clocks, sundials, and magical time-tracking items spin wildly or freeze completely.

legendary.name: Caustic Fog & Whispering Shadows
entries: Within 1 mile of the lair, a light, toxic green mist blankets the ground. Beasts native to the area become aggressive and corrupted, possessing glowing emerald eyes and shadows that seem detached from their physical bodies. Creatures resting within this area hear faint, overlapping echoes of their own past and future conversations whispering from the fog.
If Tanazir Silverquil dies, these effects fade over the course of {@dice 1d10} days.
